parameters.dataJson: ={{ JSON.stringify({ item_group_name: $node["Build Batch Context"].json.itemGroup, parent_item_group: "All Item Groups", is_group: 0 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ warehouse_name: $node["Build Batch Context"].json.warehouseName, parent_warehouse: $node["Build Batch Context"].json.parentWarehouse, company: $node["Build Batch Context"].json.company, is_group: 0 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ item_code: $node["Build Batch Context"].json.itemCode, item_name: $node["Build Batch Context"].json.itemCode, item_group: $node["Create Batch Item Group"].json.name, stock_uom: "Unit", is_stock_item: 1, is_purchase_item: 1, is_sales_item: 1, has_batch_no: 1, create_new_batch: 0, valuation_rate: $node["Build Batch Context"].json.rate, standard_rate: $node["Build Batch Context"].json.rate }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ batch_id: $node["Build Batch Context"].json.batchId, item: $node["Create Batch Item"].json.name }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ stock_entry_type: "Material Receipt", company: $node["Build Batch Context"].json.company, posting_date: $node["Build Batch Context"].json.postingDate, items: [{ item_code: $node["Create Batch Item"].json.name, t_warehouse: $node["Create Batch Warehouse"].json.name, qty: $node["Build Batch Context"].json.receiptQty, basic_rate: $node["Build Batch Context"].json.rate, use_serial_batch_fields: 1, batch_no: $node["Create Batch"].json.name }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ stock_entry_type: "Material Issue", company: $node["Build Batch Context"].json.company, posting_date: $node["Build Batch Context"].json.postingDate, items: [{ item_code: $node["Create Batch Item"].json.name, s_warehouse: $node["Create Batch Warehouse"].json.name, qty: $node["Build Batch Context"].json.issueQty, basic_rate: $node["Build Batch Context"].json.rate, use_serial_batch_fields: 1, batch_no: $node["Create Batch"].json.name }] }) }}

parameters.filtersJson: ={{ JSON.stringify({ item_code: $node["Create Batch Item"].json.name, warehouse: $node["Create Batch Warehouse"].json.name }) }}
